task_completion.description: Two Daily charts are open in the workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct chart windows are visible in NinjaTrader 8. The timeframe on both charts indicates a Daily interval (e.g., '1 Day' or 'D' in the top left corner or chart tab).

task_completion.description: First chart is configured with Bollinger Bands (Period 20, StdDev 2)
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the charts displays Bollinger Bands (three lines enveloping the price candles). The indicator label on the chart should show parameters matching Period 20 and StdDev 2 (e.g., 'Bollinger (20, 2)').

task_completion.description: Second chart is configured with RSI (Period 14)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The other chart has a sub-panel below the main price chart displaying the RSI oscillator. The indicator label should indicate a Period of 14 (e.g., 'RSI (14, 3)' or 'RSI (14)').

task_completion.description: Both charts are linked using the same instrument link color
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both chart windows display a small colored square icon (Instrument Link button) in their top right corner or toolbar, and the color is identical for both windows (e.g., both are red, or both are green).
The instrument dropdown, chart tab, or chart background watermark for both charts clearly displays 'AAPL'.

A screenshot shows the agent clicking 'Workspaces' -> 'Save' in the Control Center, or the active workspace name in the bottom right corner of the Control Center does not have an unsaved changes indicator (like a gray diamond).

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the charts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through NinjaTrader menus, indicator dialogs, and chart toolbars rather than editing workspace XML files in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The authentic NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Chart windows) is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent running Python or PowerShell scripts to generate the workspace files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NinjaTrader 8 uses colored square buttons in the chart toolbar to link instruments across windows. When linked with the same color, changing the instrument on one chart automatically updates the other. Bollinger Bands is a standard indicator with configurable Period and StdDev (task requires 20 and 2). RSI is a standard indicator with a default Period of 14. AAPL is a valid instrument with real historical data provided. Workspaces are saved via the 'Workspaces' menu in the main Control Center window.
